text: The grand halls of the Woolworth Building echoed with the excited chatter of beer enthusiasts. Scarlett Thomas weaved through the crowd, dodging Meredith Lester's impressive beer belly and narrowly avoiding a collision with Presley Lunt, who was attempting to balance seven tasting glasses in one hand. "Excuse me, pardon me, coming through.
context: This excerpt describes Scarlett Thomas navigating the crowded craft beer festival at the Woolworth Building.
